ddls:
CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., admin, developer, product owner) */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password for the user (hashed for security) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the user account was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the user account */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last login */,
  "status" TEXT /* User account status (e.g., active, inactive, suspended) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_stories" (
  "user_story_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user story */,
  "epic_id" INTEGER /* ID of the epic the user story belongs to */,
  "title" TEXT /* Title of the user story */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the user story */,
  "acceptance_criteria" TEXT /* Acceptance criteria for the user story */,
  "priority" TEXT /* Priority of the user story (e.g., high, medium, low) */,
  "release_id" INTEGER /* ID of the release the user story is assigned to */,
  "sprint_id" INTEGER /* ID of the sprint the user story is assigned to */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the user story (e.g., to do, in progress, done) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the user story was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the user story */,
  "estimated_hours" INTEGER /* Estimated time to complete the user story */,
  "actual_hours" INTEGER /* Actual time taken to complete the user story */,
  "assigned_to_user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user assigned to the user story */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_story_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_stories_epic_id FOREIGN KEY ("epic_id") REFERENCES epics ("epic_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_stories_sprint_id FOREIGN KEY ("sprint_id") REFERENCES sprints ("sprint_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_stories_release_id FOREIGN KEY ("release_id") REFERENCES releases ("release_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "releases" (
  "release_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each release */,
  "title" TEXT /* Title of the release */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the release */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the release */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the release */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the release was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the release */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the release (e.g., planned, in progress, completed) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("release_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "sprints" (
  "sprint_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each sprint */,
  "release_id" INTEGER /* ID of the release the sprint belongs to */,
  "title" TEXT /* Title of the sprint */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the sprint */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the sprint */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the sprint */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the sprint was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the sprint */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the sprint (e.g., planned, in progress, completed) */,
  "goal" TEXT /* Sprint goal or objective */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("sprint_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sprints_release_id FOREIGN KEY ("release_id") REFERENCES releases ("release_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "epics" (
  "epic_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each epic */,
  "title" TEXT /* Title of the epic */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the epic */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the epic was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the epic */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the epic (e.g., to do, in progress, done) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("epic_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "tasks" (
  "task_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each task */,
  "user_story_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user story the task belongs to */,
  "title" TEXT /* Title of the task */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the task */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the task (e.g., to do, in progress, done) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the task was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the task */,
  "estimated_hours" INTEGER /* Estimated time to complete the task */,
  "actual_hours" INTEGER /* Actual time taken to complete the task */,
  "assigned_to_user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user assigned to the task */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("task_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_tasks_user_story_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_story_id") REFERENCES user_stories ("user_story_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_tasks_assigned_to_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("assigned_to_user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "comments" (
  "comment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each comment */,
  "user_story_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user story the comment is related to */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who made the comment */,
  "comment" TEXT /* Text of the comment */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the comment was created */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("comment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_comments_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_comments_user_story_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_story_id") REFERENCES user_stories ("user_story_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "notifications" (
  "notification_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each notification */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who is to receive the notification */,
  "message" TEXT /* Text of the notification */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the notification was created */,
  "is_read" INTEGER /* Boolean indicating whether the notification has been read */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("notification_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_notifications_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "integrations" (
  "integration_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each integration */,
  "tool_name" TEXT /* Name of the integrated tool (e.g., JIRA, GitHub, Bitbucket) */,
  "api_key" TEXT /* API key for the integration */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the integration was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the integration */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("integration_id")
)
